action.description:
Introduced by Senators Cabral-Guevara, Jacque, Roys and Larson; 
cosponsored by Representatives Tusler, Fitzgerald, Clancy, Miresse, Dittrich, Palmeri, Maxey, Ortiz-Velez, O'Connor, Steffen, DeSmidt, Andraca, Roe, Knodl, Novak, Behnke, Donovan, Joers, Callahan, Kitchens, Melotik and Stubbs
